$coverage: v0.5 — federal-contracting-relevant changes from 2017→2022 NAICS revision. Most 541xxx (Professional/Scientific/Technical Services) and 561xxx (Admin Services) NAICS were UNCHANGED in 2022. The notable changes affect Information sector (51) — software publishing and Internet publishing splits.
$notes: Federal contracting historically uses services NAICS (5xxxxx), most of which were stable across the 2017→2022 revision.
The 2022 revision split or renumbered ~50 codes overall; this table covers the ~15 that touch federal contracting.
When a code is not in this table, it is either (a) UNCHANGED from 2017 to 2022, or (b) outside federal-contracting common usage. Use ecfr_search or census.gov for full concordance.
Direction matters: passing a 2017 code returns its 2022 mapping; passing a 2022 code returns its 2017 origin. The 'changeType' field identifies the relationship.

511210.note: NAICS 511210 (Software Publishers, 2017) was renumbered to 513210 in the 2022 revision. The Information sector (51) reorganization moved publishers under a new 513 subsector. Federal contracts under the old 511210 should now use 513210.

513210.note: NAICS 513210 (Software Publishers, 2022) was 511210 in the 2017 NAICS. Pre-2022 historical contracts may still cite 511210.

519130.note:
NAICS 519130 (Internet Publishing and Broadcasting and Web Search Portals, 2017) was SPLIT in the 2022 revision: software publishers → 513210, web hosting → 518210, all other Internet services → 519290. Determine the correct 2022 code by primary activity:
  • If primarily publishing software products → 513210
  • If primarily web hosting / data processing / cloud infrastructure → 518210
  • Other Internet services not elsewhere classified → 519290

519290.oldTitle: Internet Publishing and Broadcasting and Web Search Portals (2017)
519290.note: NAICS 519290 (All Other Information Services, 2022) absorbed part of the old 519130. Other parts went to 513210 and 518210.

519290_2007.note: Note: NAICS 519130 also existed in NAICS 2007 with the same title. The 2022 split applies whenever migrating from any pre-2022 vintage.

511110.note: 511110 → 513110 in the 2022 reorganization of sector 51. Same scope (newspaper publishers); just renumbered.

541510.newTitle: (Computer Systems Design and Related Services 4-digit roll-up no longer a leaf code)
541510.note: NAICS 541510 was a 6-digit 'Computer Systems Design and Related Services' code in NAICS 2002 (and earlier). Retired in NAICS 2007 — the work was distributed across new 6-digit children: 541511 (Custom Programming), 541512 (Systems Design), 541513 (Facilities Management), 541519 (Other Computer Related). Federal contracts using 541510 in solicitations are USING A RETIRED CODE — flag the SOW and use one of the four child codes instead.

541310.note: 541310 is a stable code from 2002 onward. (Listed here as a verification anchor — explicit stable codes do NOT need this lookup; this entry exists because users sometimes search to verify 'is this still valid'.)
